annotations.label: Degree of minimal polynomial of constructible point is a power of 2

annotations.label: Bijection between constructible angles and points on a constructible circle

anchor.snippet: There is a bijection between the angles that are constructible and the points that are constructible on any constructible circle

annotations.label: Characterization of constructible angles by trig values
